tasks.label: Test Dynamic Schema Plugin
args: console.log('Testing plugin schema generation...'); const plugin = (await import('./index.js')).default({debug: console.log, setPluginStatus: console.log, setPluginError: console.error}); console.log('Static schema:', JSON.stringify(plugin.schema(), null, 2)); console.log('UI Schema:', JSON.stringify(plugin.uiSchema(), null, 2)); console.log('Plugin schema test completed successfully.');
